markdown:
# Boon of Fate

You gain the following benefits.

## Improve Fate

When you or another creature within 60 feet of you succeeds on or fails a [[d20_test Test]], you can roll 2d4 and apply the total rolled as a bonus or penalty to the d20 roll. Once you use this benefit, you can't use it again until you roll [[initiative]] or finish a [[short_rest]] or [[long_rest Rest]].
